name: codex-ssh-bridge
description: Run structured SSH operations from local Codex without installing Codex on remote hosts.

interface.shortDescription: Operate allowlisted SSH hosts from local Codex.
interface.longDescription: Keeps Codex and SSH credentials on the local machine while exposing bounded remote command and file tools over a dependency-free MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use Remote SSH Ops to inspect my configured devbox.
Run the tests on my configured SSH host and explain failures.
